mnemonics.title: NIST Cloud Characteristics
mnemonics.content: **O**n-demand, **B**road access, **R**esource pooling, **R**apid elasticity, **M**easured service. (Acronym: **O B R R M** - 'Our Big Red Rocket Model')

mnemonics.title: Service Model Stack (Who Manages What)
mnemonics.content: **I**aaS: **I** Manage OS & Apps. **P**aaS: **P**rovider Manages OS, **I** Manage Apps. **S**aaS: **S**it back & Relax, Provider Manages **S**oftware. (Highlights the key management responsibility for each model.)
